name: Set of 2 Easton Slat 24" Counter Height Barstool Mahogany - Christopher Knight Home: Armless, Dark Red, Hardwood Frame, Solid Pattern
description: These Christopher Knight Home Easton Slat 24" Counter Stool (Set of 2) are a perfect addition to your kitchen or dining room. These stools made from acacia wood, add a natural element to the room and will balance out any décor you have while the seat top pattern demonstrates attention to detail and innovation in design. The scooped seats and foot rails make this a very comfortable stool. Place them up to your counter in your kitchen or in your entertaining space to provide extra seating. You will appreciate the extra seating these Christopher Knight Home Easton Slat 24" Counter Stools provide.
